series_metadata.series_description: Tax Commissioner''s tax expenditure report (O.R.C. 5703.48) describing the effect of tax expenditures on the general revenue fund, estimate memoranda, and any spreadsheets, data, programming algorithms, and/or calculations estimating a tax expenditure.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
